name: Funnel Cakes #2
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift together the dry ingredients: whole wheat flour, salt, baking soda, and baking powder.
2. Add honey, egg, and warm milk to the sifted dry ingredients. Beat until smooth.
3. Heat about 2 inches of oil in a large cast-iron skillet over medium heat.
4. Test the oil temperature by dropping a small piece of dough into it. If it floats and bubbles around the edges, the oil is ready.
5. Hold your finger at the bottom of a funnel and pour some batter into the hot oil. Use a spiral motion to pour the batter.
6. The cakes should look like free-form spiral sculptures. Fry until golden brown, turning once.
7. Drain the cakes on paper towels. Drizzle with honey or maple syrup and serve hot.
The amount you can make will depend on the size of the batter used for each cake.
